page: Vultr vx1-g-64c-256g-3840s is a general-purpose server belonging to the VX1 Cloud Compute family. It is built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by an AMD EPYC processor running at 2.0 GHz. The hardware configuration delivers 64 shared vCPUs, which map to 32 physical cores with 2 threads per core. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB of memory per core, and includes a 32 MB L3 cache. Local storage is bundled as a 3840 GB NVMe SSD, and the server includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. No dedicated GPU hardware is present on this instance.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance in several key areas. The server achieves top 10% placement in single-core stress-ng tests, large-block memory bandwidth for both read and write operations, and Passmark database operations. Multi-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core, Passmark CPU, and Passmark CPU encryption tests. For language model workloads, prompt processing speeds are strong to top-tier, though text generation speeds for small models fall into the average tier.

Given its shared CPU allocation, this server offers a cost-efficient profile for resource-dense workloads that do not require dedicated CPU threads. The combination of a high core count, substantial memory, and fast NVMe storage makes it highly suitable for large-scale database hosting, static web serving, multi-threaded data decompression, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
description: Vultr vx1-g-64c-256g-3840s is a general-purpose server in the VX1 Cloud Compute family, featuring 64 shared vCPUs on an AMD EPYC x86_64 architecture with 32 physical cores. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM and a bundled 3840 GB NVMe SSD, but lacks a dedicated GPU. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in single-core stress tests, large-block memory bandwidth, and database operations, alongside strong multi-core and encryption capabilities. The shared CPU allocation offers a cost-efficient profile for high-density workloads. This server is highly suited for large-scale database operations, static web serving, and multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Vultr vx1-g-64c-256g-3840s is a general-purpose server featuring 64 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 3840 GB NVMe SSD storage, optimized for database operations and web serving.

tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose instance featuring sixty-four shared cores, massive NVMe storage, and top-tier database performance.

Bundled 3840 GB NVMe SSD local storage
Top-tier performance in database operations and large-block memory bandwidth
Strong multi-core processing and static web serving throughput
